column1: #   - "*" wildcard for RW officers (access to all territories)
# Residents can only read their own territory data
# RT officers can read and write within their assigned territory
# RW officers can read and write across ALL territories (wildcard)
# Residents can read fees for their own tenants (scoped by service layer)
# RT officers manage fees within their territory
# RW officers manage fees across all territories
# RW officers inherit all RT officer permissions
# RT officers inherit all resident permissions
